creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to rsmith from comment #6)
That is why poudriere is so nice, it does all of that for you. And it checks the port in a clean environment so if dependencies change, it will tell you about it (the port will not build if any are missing).

Have a look at it. It is very easy to set up:
https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/testing/#testing-poudriere
